lines.lyrics: The signs are fleeting, though I've never been for sure
It's coming down to dreaming, now I'll never pray for more
It's fading away, I'll continue to search
If you wanna stay
I hear a voice, "Time won't wait for you"
You'll start to notice when you gotta make it through
Live off the land and try to expand
Cause maybe they're wrong
Silent like it's gone
Silent life is gone
4 in the morning, where can you find the truth
They need to see me, the innocence has fallen through
The devil he waits, the devil he knows
What you're gonna do
I need your love to save me
And pick me up through the fog

lines.chords: Bm  D  C#m7  E  F#m  E  D
lines.lyrics: Stuck in the same daydream, you know I can't do it alone
I saw a blaze and I can keep it away if I see your face
Silent like it's gone
Silent life is gone
